name: io.github.PantelisGeorgiadis/dicomweb-mcp-server
title: DICOMweb MCP Server
description: MCP server exposing a DICOMweb DICOM archive to AI assistants via QIDO-RS and WADO-RS.

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the DICOMweb server (used for both QIDO-RS and WADO-RS requests).

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_AUTH
environmentVariables.description: Authentication type: 'basic' or 'bearer'. Omit for unauthenticated access.

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_USER
environmentVariables.description: Username for Basic authentication. Required when DICOMWEB_AUTH=basic.

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_PASS
environmentVariables.description: Password for Basic authentication. Required when DICOMWEB_AUTH=basic.

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authentication. Required when DICOMWEB_AUTH=bearer.

environmentVariables.name: DICOMWEB_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Fetch request timeout in milliseconds. Omit to disable timeout.
